name: Dirzuga Ospha
title: Knowledge Embraced
abilityWindow: After a player uses PRODUCTION”:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow  them to ready a planet they control in that system.

name: Dirzuga Rophal
title: Flaah Ascendant
abilityWindow: After you resolve a tactical action during which you gained control of a readied planet:
abilityText: You may place a structure on one of those planets.
unlockCondition: Have 6 or more captured Infantry on planet cards you control

name: Letani Miasmiala
title: The Symphony
abilityWindow: ACTION:for each of your planets that contain a mech, ready those planets.
abilityText: Then, for each of those planets, you may use the production abilities of all units in that system.

name: 3X0M4
title: Repository Crawler
abilityWindow: During the announce retreat step of a combat containing neutral units
abilityText: you may exhaust this card and choose a player: That player chooses an empty system or a system containing neutral units for them to retreat into.

name: T4X0N
title: Network Hardening
abilityWindow: After a round of ground combat, when 1 of your infantry is destroyed, roll 1 die.
abilityText: If the result is 6 or greater, place the unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place a fighter in the space area of a system of one of your space docks and no other player's units, removing an infantry from this card for each fighter placed.
unlockCondition: A player loses a combat involving neutral units

name: K3T4X
title: Hypernet Infiltrator
abilityWindow: At the start of your turn, place this card on top of a non-fighter ship unit upgrade technology you own.
abilityText: Matching units you control and neutral units gain +1 capacity. When you place this card over a unit upgrade technology, remove any number of neutral units from the board. At the end of that game round, purge this card.

name: Borbo Cerebro
title: Figment Merger
abilityWindow: After any die is rolled:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card and reroll that die.

name: Gogol Military
title: Clade Troop Recruiter
abilityWindow: After another player moves ships into the active system:
abilityText: You may remove 1 of your destoryers and produce 1 ship in this system as though there are no other player's ships.
unlockCondition: Have 5 Hallucination tokens on the board

name: Amplexus
title: Until Death do us part
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: If this card is not attached, you may attach it to another non-strategy card in a player's play area. That card has no ability text while this card is attached; unit abilities are unaffected. At the begining of the strategy phase, if this card is attached, purge it.

name: an Exception
title: Council Orthocrat
abilityWindow: After an agenda is revealed, predict an outcome:
abilityText: after voting, you may exhaust this card to choose a player who voted for the same outcome as you to draw 1 action card and remove a command token from their faction sheet and return it to their owners reinforcements.

name: an Escalation
title: Righteous Defender
abilityWindow: When an outlaw activates a system that contains a planet you control:
abilityText: You may choose 1 of your units in that system to gain SPACE CANNON 6 until the end of this turn.

name: an Extinction
title: Gunboat Diplomacy
abilityWindow: After an agenda is revealed, predict an outcome of the agenda
abilityText: If the outcome you predicted is not resolved, immediately perform a tactical action without placing or spending a command token. Then, purge this card

name: Sister Olon
title: Field Hospitaler
abilityWindow: When a player gains control of a planet:
abilityText: ready that planet, then exhaust this card.

name: Sister Myrion
title: Field Medic
abilityWindow: When you would spend resources to research technology:
abilityText: reduce the cost by 1 for each tech speciality planet you control of a diffrent color.

name: Sister Lanis
title: Esteemed Biologer
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Draw a number of abilities from the Twilight Fall ability deck equal to the number of players. Give 1 to each player, than purge this card

name: Mar Sikra
title: Strike Contact
abilityWindow: At any time, you may exhaust this card
abilityText: to allow a player to play the most recently discarded action card as if it were a card in their hand.

name: S'Sy'
title: Coodrinated Raids
abilityText: When you destroy another player's structure, draw one action card. You may exchange action cards as part of a transaction.
unlockCondition: 1 of your mechs is destroyed during ground combat.

name: The Strike Master
title: Popular Instigator
abilityWindow: After you move ships into a system
abilityText: destroy all structures belong to other players in this system, and cause each mech belonging to other players in this system to become sustained. Then, purge this card.

name: Envoy Shak Tai Trakt
title: Council Orthocrat
abilityWindow: When an agenda outcome that you voted for is resolved:
abilityText: you may exhaust this card and choose a player who voted for an outcome you did not vote for; that player must give you 1 random action card from their hand, if able.

name: Overseer Sestra
title: The Judicial
abilityWindow: Whenever one of more of your units uses their PRODUCTION ability
abilityText: Apply +1 to the total PRODUCTION value of your units
unlockCondition: produce 4 non-fighter ships in a single system using PRODUCTION

name: Archon Kish'ka
title: Rector Operative
abilityWindow: At the end of your tactical action during which you gained control of a planet from another player:
abilityText: You may remove your command token from this system; if you do, use that token to perform a tactical action in another system that contains a planet controlled by that player.

name: Rumplesilkskin
title: Golden Weaver
abilityWindow: After a player replenishes their commodities
abilityText: Exhaust this card to convert those commodities to trade goods, then place 1 of those trade goods on your faction sheet.

name: Chessus Audax
title: Path Threader
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: You may ignore the movement effects of nebulae.
unlockCondition: There are 4 nebulae on the board.

name: Tactus Redux
title: Weavewender
abilityWindow: At the begining of the invasion step in a system that contains you ships:
abilityText: You may purge this card to move or place a weaveway token into that system. Choose an adjacent non-home system other than mecatol Rex that is adjacent to 2 nebula anomalies, if possible. Destroy all units in that system, purge each planet card that corresponds to that system tile and replace it with an available Hyperline tile.

name: Sindra of Brass Dunes
title: Embedded Operatives
abilityWindow: After a player commits 1 or more units to land on a planet:
abilityText: You may Exhaust this card to let that player remove 1 of their ground forces from the board and place it on that planet.

name: Undersecretary Cheliyxx
title: Keleres Liason
abilityWindow: During your first round of each combat:
abilityText: apply -1 to your opponent's combat rolls'
unlockCondition: Have 1 face up secret objective in each other player's play area

name: Major Jana Pradhan
title: Veteran Soldier
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Look at any number of unrevealed Stage II objectives. Gain 1 command token for each of those objctives you didn't look at. Rearrange the unrevealed Stage II objectives in any order you wish.
